title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (a reasoning model), Scout (an always-on work agent), and Majorana 2 (a quantum advancement). The video frames this as Microsoft's escalating competition with OpenAI while maintaining its partnership, positioning itself across models, agents, quantum hardware, and developer tools.
